llm_flavor: Brother Cedric — priest of the Chapel of the Old Light. Gentle, never takes a tithe, speaks in soft parables. Quiet faith, not pious.

tastes.reaction: "For the evening row. The chapel will be brighter for it."
"A softer flame. I have a hook by the altar that's been waiting."
"A flower that drinks the dark. I'll plant it by the door."
Cedric runs a thumb over the gilt. "Knowledge is its own quiet prayer."
"For sermons I haven't written yet. Bless you."
"Light that grows from a vine. The old gardeners would have wept."

disdains.reaction: Cedric flinches. "Please. Not in the chapel."
"No swords. Some hands lay them down here."
"Out. Out, child. Some things will not be blessed."
